image_closure.transport_note: This environment required NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 for bounded TCGdex fetches because Windows certificate revocation checks were failing against api.tcgdex.net.

repair.issue: bounded input-json image fallback compared leading-zero stamped number_plain values against non-padded sibling base number_plain values
repair.change: normalizeNumberPlainKey now canonicalizes leading-zero number keys before source and sibling-base grouping
repair.result: promo-family remainder rows now reach deterministic representative assignment instead of false unmatched results

apply.representative_note: Identity is confirmed. Displayed image is a representative image until the exact stamped image is available.
